subject: english
text: How do you respond to others’ trouble?
group_heading: Answer in Two or More Sentences

subject: english
text:
Read the following poem and write the theme of the poem in your mother tongue: 
Question not, but live and labour
Till your goal be won,
Helping every feeble neighbour,
Seeking help from none;
Life is mostly froth and bubble,
Two things stand like stone:
Kindness in another’s trouble,
Courage in your own.
-------------------------------
labour, won, neighbour, one,
bubble, stone, trouble, own
